tooltip.key: The key name. Combined with the group this becomes: group.key
tooltip.keys:
Keys work as a path with dots as separator:
• group.subkey → nested array in PHP
• Select an existing group from the dropdown
• Or type a new group name
• Leave group empty for a root-level key
